title: Flow cytometry analysis of diatoms and coccolithophores with diagnostic stains (via a BD Biosciences Accuri C6)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f3ur4","text":"This general protocol can be used for assessing eukaryotic populations with various diagnostic stains (SYTOX for live/dead cells; DAF-FM for nitric oxide producing cells; DCFDA for reactive oxygen species; others). It is geared for samples that are ~5-10 µm in size, using a 70 µm orifice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":288}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
